verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone
verify.label: Verification Code
verify.requestNewCodeBody: To request a new code, please go back and enter your credentials again.

login.forgotPasswordAlertBody: Please contact support to reset your password.
login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
login.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Create an account
login.enterValidPhone: Enter a valid phone number (10+ digits).
login.passwordMinChars: Password must be at least 6 characters.

welcome.previewText: Welcome to AI PEER! This is a preview of your settings.
welcome.lead: Welcome to AI PEER. We'll help you personalize your experience in just a few simple steps.
welcome.chooseTextSizeSub: Select a comfortable reading size that works best for you
welcome.previewNote: *Preview adjusts as you change text size.
welcome.adjustDisplaySubtitle: Pick colors and contrast that are easy on your eyes
welcome.previewContrastNote: *Preview shows your chosen contrast and colors.
welcome.setLanguageSubtitle: Choose your language for the app
welcome.soundAlertsSubtitle: Enable or disable alert sounds for notifications
welcome.toggleSoundNote: *Toggle sound alerts and play a short preview (vibration).

questionnaire.subtitle: Fall Risk Questionnaire
questionnaire.info2: Rate how concerned you would be about falling during each activity
questionnaire.info3: If you do not do an activity, answer how concerned you would be if you did
questionnaire.howConcerned: How concerned are you that you might fall:
questionnaire.notAnsweredError: Please select an answer before continuing
questionnaire.thankYou: Thank you for completing the assessment!
questionnaire.question3: Getting in or out of a chair
questionnaire.question5: Reaching up for something above your head or on the ground
questionnaire.question6: Walking up or down a slope
questionnaire.question7: Going out to a social event (e.g. religious service, family gathering, or club meeting)
questionnaire.lowDescription: You have expressed low concern about falling during daily activities. Continue with your current activities and maintain your strength and balance.
questionnaire.lowRec3: Schedule annual check-ups with your doctor
questionnaire.moderateDescription: You have expressed moderate concern about falling. Consider discussing these concerns with your healthcare provider and implementing fall prevention strategies.
questionnaire.moderateRec1: Talk to your doctor about fall prevention
questionnaire.moderateRec2: Consider a balance and strength training program
questionnaire.moderateRec3: Review your medications with your healthcare provider
questionnaire.highDescription: You have expressed high concern about falling during daily activities. We strongly recommend discussing these concerns with your healthcare provider as soon as possible.
questionnaire.highRec1: Schedule an appointment with your doctor promptly
questionnaire.highRec2: Ask about a referral to a physical therapist
questionnaire.highRec3: Have a thorough home safety evaluation
questionnaire.highRec4: Consider using assistive devices if recommended
questionnaire.highRec5: Review all medications with your healthcare provider

chat-history.title: Chat History
chat-history.deleteConversationBody: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

ai-chat.askAi: Ask AI Chat about fall risk, activity, or tips

settings.title: Settings & Preferences
settings.displayDescription: Choose colors that are easy on your eyes
settings.logoutConfirmation: Are you sure you want to logout?

exercise.categoriesDescription: Choose a category to start your workout

exercise-session.enableCamera: Tap Start Monitoring to enable camera
exercise-session.placePhone: Please place your phone so your full body is visible
exercise-session.tip1: Place your phone so your full body is visible

video-confirm.pageSub: This confirmation step ensures the Vision model knows exactly which exercise you're performing.

FRAMatrixCard.riskBasedOn: Based on alignment of physical fall risk (tandem stand) and perceived fall risk (FES-I).
